LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANT TWM INDUSTRIES' MOTION: TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT, TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT TO MANDATORY GROUNDS, AND TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT BASED ON GROUNDS OF POTENTIAL IMPROPER SERVICE. ARGUED AND THE TENTATIVE RULING IS AMENDED AS FOLLOWS: PURSUANT TO CCP SECTION 473, THE DEFAULT OR DEFAULT JUDGMENT IS SET ASIDE AS A RESULT OF THE MANDATORY GROUNDS SUPPORTED BY THE ATTORNEY AFFIDAVIT OF FAULT. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. (302/CWW) JUDGE: CHARLOTTE WALTER WOOLARD, REPORTER: KENT GUBBINE, CSR 5797

Notice Of Motion And Motion: To Set Aside Default,To Set Aside Default To Mandatory Grounds, And To Set Aside Default Based On Grounds Of Potential Improper Service
Off Calendar Feb-03-2009 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: DEFENDANT TWM INDUSTRIES Motion: To Set Aside Default, To Set Aside Default To Mandatory Grounds, And To Set Aside Default Based On Grounds Of Potential Improper Service. DEFENDANT'S MOTION. Appearances: Russell A. Robinson, Esq. of the Law Office of Russell A. Robinson, (415) 255-0462, appearing for Plaintiff, and opposing party; Sean F. Moriarty, Esq., of Cesari, Werner and Moriarty, (415) 391-1113, appearing for Defendant, TWM Industries, and moving party. There are no other appearances. Argued and the Tentative ruling is amended as follows: Pursuant to CCP Section 473, the default or default judgment is set aside as a result of the mandatory grounds supported by the attorney affidavit of fault. Order signed in Open Court. (302/CWW/VC) Judge: Charlotte Walter Woolard, Reporter: Kent Gubbine, CSR 5797
